# KeyGG

> Trusted store for genuine Microsoft product keys — Office 2019/2021/2024, Windows 11 Pro, Microsoft 365, Project, Visio, and more. Lifetime licenses, instant digital delivery, 24/7 support.

KeyGG sells authentic Microsoft software activation keys to individuals and businesses worldwide. Every key is genuine, sourced from authorized channels, and backed by a lifetime warranty. Delivery is fully digital and typically completed within minutes of purchase. Payment is processed securely via Stripe, PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, and Apple Pay.

## What we sell
- [Windows 11 Professional Key](/): Lifetime license for 1 PC, instant digital delivery.
- [Microsoft Office 2024 Professional Plus](/): Lifetime license for 1 PC — Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Access, Publisher.
- [Microsoft Office 2021 Professional Plus](/): Lifetime license for 1 PC, perpetual activation.
- [Microsoft Office 2019 Professional Plus](/product/office-2019-professional-plus): Lifetime license for 1 PC.
- [Office 2024 / 2021 / 2019 Home & Business for Mac](/): Lifetime license for 1 Mac.
- [Microsoft 365 Family](/): 6 users, 6TB cloud storage, 1-year subscription.
- [Office 365 Professional Plus](/): 5 devices, 100GB cloud storage, 1-year subscription.
- [Project Professional 2024](/): Lifetime license for 1 PC.
- [Visio Professional 2024](/): Lifetime license for 1 PC.
- [ESET Smart Security Premium](/): 1 device, 1-year license.

## Why customers choose KeyGG
- Genuine Microsoft keys, sourced from authorized partners.
- Instant digital delivery — keys emailed within minutes.
- Lifetime activation warranty on perpetual licenses.
- 24/7 customer support via chat and email.
- Secure checkout (Stripe, PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay).
- Rated 4.9/5 by 12,000+ verified buyers.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Full product catalog, pricing, customer reviews, FAQs.
- [Office 2019 Professional Plus product page](/product/office-2019-professional-plus): Details, system requirements, activation guide.

## Contact & support
Support is available 24/7 through the on-site chat and email. Refund and warranty policies apply to every order; contact support before requesting a chargeback.
